name: Remote Service Execution via SMB2 Svcctl
description: Network activity involving SMB2, which is associated with the Service Control Manager (SVCCTL), was observed. This behavior may indicate unauthorized remote service execution attempts within the network.

filterSets.name: Remote Service Execution Through SMB2 Svcctl Detected Variant 3
